name: Build Mirrors
description: Starts local Maven (Reposilite) and npm (Verdaccio) mirror containers and configures Maven and npm to use them.

network.description: Docker network that the mirrors will join

mavenMirrorUrl.description: URL of the Maven mirror for settings.xml

mavenMirrorId.description: ID for the mirror entry in settings.xml

npmToken.description: Auth token for the npm registry (Verdaccio accepts any value)
